creator: fbsd-bugzilla@schlachter.ca
text:
Hi Daniel,

I've been using mixxx built with this patch locally for the last few weeks. I haven't built with poudriere. I should also note that the patches I removed from the port were changes that have been merged upstream and released in v2.3.1 (PRs 4122, 4123, & 4124 in https://github.com/mixxxdj/mixxx/).

David
